budget.rationale: DeepSeek V3 API only. Infrastructure is $0 (Docker local, free tiers). Estimated ~$12/month for 500 leads/day processing.

approval_gates.name: Email Send Approval
approval_gates.description: Board OR Sales Director must approve email batches before sending via Mailgun.

approval_gates.name: Voice Call Initiation
approval_gates.description: First 20 voice calls require Board approval. After track record, auto-approved.

approval_gates.name: New Agent Hire
approval_gates.description: Adding a new agent to the org chart requires Board approval. No timeout — must be manual.

approval_gates.name: Budget Override
approval_gates.description: No budget overrides allowed. $0 infrastructure is the hard rule.

approval_gates.name: Skill Modification
approval_gates.description: Changes to agent skill definitions require Sales Director review within 24hr. Auto-approve on positive track record.

approval_gates.name: High-Cost API Call
approval_gates.description: Only DeepSeek API is used. Cost is capped by pay-as-you-go billing. Auto-approve.

module_budgets.covers: Web scraping infra only (proxies if needed)
DeepSeek API: 500 leads × 500 tokens for A/B variants
DeepSeek API: call scripts + Google TTS free tier
No API costs — strategic coordination only
No API costs — pipeline oversight only
No API costs — runs once weekly
